text:
Japan is back atop the medal podium in men's gymnastics, and by the narrowest of margins.

The country just edged past China to win gold in a battle between the two favorites heading into the event, winning by a minuscule 0.532, while the United States got on the podium as well with a bronze medal in dramatic fashion.

Here are thefull results:

While the competition for gold and silver seemed almost a foregone conclusion heading into the event, the battle for bronze was very much up for grabs between the United States, Great Britain and Ukraine.

In the end, it was Stephen Nedoroscik's epic performance on the pommel horse that helped the United States clinch the bronze:

Great Britain took third overall in qualification, while the United States finished fifth.

But the American men turned it up a gear in the final.
title: Olympic Men's Gymnastics 2024: Team All-Around Medal Winners and Scores
author: Timothy Rapp
